issues.description: Action type should be 'AttachDon' (set up DON!! cards as active), not 'GiveDon' (gain DON!!). 'Set up' means activate/attach existing DON!!, not create new ones.
Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. Card text explicitly states '[End of Your Turn]'.
Condition should check Leader type using 'LeaderHasAnyType' with types ["FILM","Straw Hat Crew"], not generic 'HasCardOnBoard' check. Current condition does not enforce the type restriction.
Action type should be 'AttachDon', not 'GiveDon', for the same reason as effect[0].
